types.name: GromeConfig
types.definition: version: number; projectId: string; deny: string[]; allow?: string[]; extractors: { routes: boolean; types: boolean; schemas: boolean; handoffs: boolean; };

types.name: Connection
types.definition: projectId: string; name: string; path: string; linked: string; // ISO timestamp

types.name: ExtractedRoute
types.definition: method: string; path: string; source: string; file: string; params: string[]; response?: string; confidence: number;

types.name: ExtractedType
types.definition: name: string; source: string; file: string; definition: string; exported: boolean; confidence: number;

types.name: ExtractedSchema
types.definition: name: string; type: 'zod' | 'prisma'; source: string; file: string; shape: Record<string, string>; confidence: number;

types.name: ExtractionResult
types.definition: routes: ExtractedRoute[]; types: ExtractedType[]; schemas: ExtractedSchema[]; framework: string | null;

types.name: RouteMapFile
types.definition: version: number; generatedAt: string; routes: ExtractedRoute[];

types.name: SharedTypesFile
types.definition: version: number; generatedAt: string; types: ExtractedType[];

types.name: ApiSchemasFile
types.definition: version: number; generatedAt: string; schemas: ExtractedSchema[];

types.name: ProjectManifest
types.definition: version: number; generatedAt: string; thisProject: string; connections: Array<Connection & { framework: string | null }>; stats: { routes: number; types: number; schemas: number; };

types.name: Handoff
types.definition: id: string; from: string;           // project name that created it fromPath: string;       // project root path type: 'feature-complete' | 'breaking-change' | 'dependency-update' | 'migration' | 'note'; summary: string;        // one-line for agents to scan quickly context: { endpoints?: Array<{ method: string; path: string; request?: string; response?: string }>; files_changed?: string[]; breaking_changes?: string[]; dependencies_added?: string[]; dependencies_removed?: string[]; env_vars_added?: string[]; env_vars_removed?: string[]; migration_steps?: string[]; notes?: string; }; status: 'open' | 'acknowledged' | 'done'; created: string;        // ISO timestamp acknowledged_by: string[];  // project names that have seen it

types.name: SecretMatch
types.definition: name: string; value: string;       // the matched text (truncated for safety) field: string;       // which field it was found in
